## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the Baseten project closeout.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Baseten Project Closed:** All deliverables are complete, and the project is effectively finished.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Final Check:** Andi will message Baseten to confirm no last-minute needs exist before formal closeout.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Sydney OOO:** Sydney is OOO next week (Wed–Fri) for a family trip to Vancouver but will front-load work and remain available.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

## Topics

### Baseten Project Closeout

  - [The Baseten team accepted the meeting invite but did not join.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Rationale:** No outstanding needs from GrowthX, as all project deliverables are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Decision:** Andi will send a final message to Baseten to confirm no unique needs remain before closing the project.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Sydney OOO & Work Plan

  - [Sydney is OOO next week (Wed–Fri) for a family trip to Vancouver.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Reason:** To be with family for a sister-in-law's birth.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Work Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Front-load work to minimize coverage needs.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [Remain available during normal hours to manage light client loads (Redis, Hex).](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Personal Logistics:**](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [The trip is one month long, requiring a return flight.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Sydney's cat will stay with parents to avoid travel-related jet lag.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:** Message Baseten to confirm no final needs before project closeout.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Sydney:** Front-load work and remain available during OOO period.](https://fathom.video/share/_YEvY6bh6QvvDcr_mnSSX38fZHnFHUYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
